Subject: FW: LVH/JB

Hey Leslie,
Can you get a copy of this email over to Jeffrey
ASAP?

-----Original Message-----
From: Gil Karson [mailto:GKarson@GISPC.COM]
Sent: Thursday, June 22, 2006 11:27 AM
To: Tommy Mottola; Lawrence Shire
Subject: RE: LVH/JB

Per Michael David moments ago (he stepped out of a
meeting to talk to me
because he had received an urgent call from Tommy
and then my call), we
will have a markup of our draft from Nan Bases today
(I called Michael
because I have only been getting voicemail with
Nan). Michael says he
wants to close quickly as well. G

-----Original Message-----
From: Tommy Mottola

[mailto:Tommy@casablanca-music.com]

To: Gil Karson; Lawrence Shire
Subject: RE: LVH/JB
We absolutely must close JB today or tomorrow.
Signed, sealed
and delivered.

-----Original Message-----
From: Gil Karson [mailto:GKarson@GISPC.COM]
Sent: Tuesday, June 20, 2006 2:20 PM
To: nicholas.ribis@resortsint.com; Tommy Mottola;
Ken Ciancimino
Cc: ldorn@colonyresortslvh.com;
plaughlin@gcslaw.com; Lawrence
Shire
Subject: LVH/JB

Gentlemen:
I just had a very positive call from Michael David.
He is
feeling better and has now had a chance to review
his attorney's notes
on our redrafted agreement. He tells me that there
are absolutely no
open "deal points", only a variety of logistical and
"lawyer points"
that he thinks we will be able to work through
relatively easily (as an
example, they want to make sure they don't need to
exercise their
production options around the world in order to
preserve our casino
exclusivity in the various territories outside the
US and Canada).
Michael is meeting with his lawyer (Nan Bases)
tomorrow
afternoon to whittle down the list and decide upon
their positions on
these few final points. He will then have Nan call
me to finish this
up, hopefully to be signed this week. I will keep
you posted.
Best regards, Gil
